title: Senior Doctor - GlaxoSmithKline India - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - GlaxoSmithKline India - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
GlaxoSmithKline India has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About GlaxoSmithKline India:
GlaxoSmithKline India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GlaxoSmithKline India!
